Package neqsim.process.chemistry.rca

Class RootCauseAnalyser

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.rca.RootCauseAnalyser
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RootCauseAnalyser extends Object implements Serializable
Root cause analyser for chemical-related incidents in well, flow assurance and process systems.

Given a set of Symptoms plus contextual data (chemical inventory, water chemistry, temperature, pressure, material), the analyser ranks plausible root causes by combining:

  • Direct symptom-to-cause mapping (deposit found ⇒ scale / wax / asphaltene candidates).
  • Chemical compatibility issues from a ChemicalCompatibilityAssessor.
  • Process condition flags (high temperature, high shear, oxygen ingress, low pH).

Each candidate gets a score 0..1 and a tag (PRIMARY / CONTRIBUTING / POSSIBLE / RULED_OUT). The top-ranked candidate is the primary recommendation; others are listed for follow-up investigation.

The analyser is deliberately rule-based and explainable — every candidate carries an evidence narrative that justifies its score. This is appropriate for engineering-review workflows where black-box ML output is hard to defend.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

      Returns a structured map for JSON serialisation.
      Returns:
      ordered map

    • addEvidence

      public void addEvidence(Map<String,Double> likelihoods)
      Adds a piece of independent evidence and updates the Bayesian posterior over root-cause candidates by code, using prior ∝ existing posterior (or RootCauseCandidate.getScore() on first call) and posterior_i &prop; prior_i &middot; likelihood_i. Posteriors are normalised to sum to 1.0 across all known candidate codes. Codes not in likelihoods are treated with likelihood 1.0 (no information).

      This complements the deterministic rule-based ranking with a probabilistic update suitable for sparse, noisy field evidence (lab assays, sensor diagnostics, operator observations).

      Parameters:
      likelihoods - map of candidate code to likelihood P(evidence | code), values >= 0

    • addEvidence

      public void addEvidence(String code, double likelihood)
      Convenience overload: adds a single piece of evidence for one candidate code.
      Parameters:
      code - candidate code (e.g. "CO2_CORROSION")
      likelihood - P(evidence | this code) >= 0

    • getBayesianPosteriors

      public Map<String,Double> getBayesianPosteriors()
      Returns the current Bayesian posterior over candidate codes (defensive copy).
      Returns:
      code -> posterior probability (sums to 1.0 if at least one update has been applied)

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Returns the result as pretty-printed JSON.
      Returns:
      JSON string
